data.title: Albertsons Companies joins OpenAI Ad Pilot Program to enhance AI strategy in advertising.
data.description: The latest advancement in AI strategy has been revealed by Albertsons Companies from Boise, Idaho, as they declare their participation in the OpenAI Ad Pilot Program.

data.title: Humann and Texas Athletics partner to promote heart health with in-game experiences in Austin. AUSTIN, Texas, Feb. 12, 2026.
data.description: In Austin, a locally-based cardiovascular supplement brand has joined forces with UT Athletics to promote heart health, blood flow, and overall performance. The partnership, launched on February 12, 2026, aims to merge sports and wellness during American Heart Health Month. This collaboration between Humann and Texas Athletics showcases the importance of cardiovascular support in enhancing on-court performance and overall well-being.

data.title: Tech stocks, including Apple and Nvidia, lost $500 billion in market value on Thursday, with Apple alone recording a loss of $200.04 billion.
data.description: Thursday's market downturn on Wall Street saw a significant tech sell-off, resulting in a total market value loss exceeding $500 billion across 10 major companies. Unlike previous declines primarily affecting software stocks, this decrease also impacted traditional hardware giants. The largest single-day market cap losses within the tech sector on Thursday reported by Coinmarketcap.com were as follows: Apple Inc. experienced a $200.04 billion drop, Tesla Inc. lost $52.28 billion, Amazon.com Inc. saw a decrease of $51.08 billion, Broadcom Inc. faced a decline of $41.77 billion, Cisco Systems Inc. lost $39.42 billion, Meta Platforms Inc. experienced a $35.19 billion decrease, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported a loss of $30.85 billion, AppLovin Corp. saw a decrease of $28.05 billion, NVIDIA Corp. faced a $20.82 billion drop, and Palantir Technologies Inc. lost $19.54 billion. This information can be further explored on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ETHZilla, a firm with publicly traded Ethereum treasury, shifts to tokenizing jet engine leases as ETH declines.
data.description: ETHZilla, a publicly traded Ethereum treasury company, is converting ownership of jet engines into tokens that represent equity. These engines are being leased to a significant air carrier. This move allows investors to participate in the ownership of these engines through the tokenization process.

data.title: Recent Trump admin decisions disrupt US aviation, creating confusion amidst already strained system.
data.description: Recent unexpected decisions made by the Trump administration have led to confusion within the already overwhelmed U.S. aviation sector.

data.title: Hyper, a digital infrastructure partner, appoints Wendi Runyon as Chief Strategy Officer in Richmond.
data.description: In the city of Richmond, Virginia, on February 12, 2026, Hyper, a digital infrastructure partner located in the United States, announced the appointment of Wendi Runyon as their Chief Strategy Officer. This move is aimed at reshaping the approach to designing, constructing, distributing, and supporting mission-critical solutions. Wendi will now be part of the executive leadership team to provide strategic direction for the company.

data.title: Tekmetric hosts Tektonic 2026 conference in Houston from April 9-11, aiming to help 1,000+ auto repair professionals improve results.
data.description: Houston-based company Tekmetric is organizing Tektonic 2026, a conference aimed at assisting auto repair shops in enhancing operations, team leadership, and growth. Scheduled from April 9-11 at the Marriott Marquis Houston, the event anticipates over 1,000 attendees, including shop owners, managers, service advisors, and technicians. Tektonic offers specialized content for various shop roles through interactive playbooks and practical training sessions.

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried claims Trump changed 'insane regulation' by Dems, pulls investment back to US, DOJ no longer indicting entire industries under Trump, Dems blamed for corporate taxes increase and money offshore.
data.description: Sam Bankman-Fried reposted President Trump's tweet praising job numbers, criticizing President Biden for hindering companies with regulations. Bankman-Fried accused Dems of excessive regulations and mentioned how DOJ under Biden indicted industries, pushing firms offshore. He lauded Trump for easing regulations and decreasing corporate taxes, allowing prediction markets to open in the US. Bankman-Fried also criticized Dem tax policies for increasing corporate taxes and creating loopholes leading to money being kept offshore. Trump's approach was heralded for different tax policies.

data.title: NexusTek listed in CRN's 2026 MSP 500 List, marking ten years of recognition as a top managed service provider in Denver.
data.description: Denver-based company NexusTek has been recognized as a leading managed service provider for the tenth year in a row. The company offers cloud services, managed IT solutions, and cybersecurity services on a national scale. This accolade was awarded by CRN®, a division of The Channel Company.

data.title: B&J Welding Supply acquires GM Welding Supply in San Angelo, TX, expanding their footprint in the industry.
data.description: Dallas, February 12, 2026 - In an exciting development, Cordatus Capital (Cordatus) and B&J Welding Supply have successfully completed the acquisition of GM Welding Supply, a company based in San Angelo, TX. GM Welding Supply specializes in distributing industrial gases, propane, and welding supplies, aligning seamlessly with the products offered by Cordatus and B&J. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone in the companies' growth plans and will strengthen their presence in the market.

data.title: Uber and Mazda partner to enhance U.S. dealership experience, boosting efficiencies and satisfaction. Uber's ongoing efforts to diversify service offerings and expand partnerships. Launches Abu Dhabi's first robotaxi service alongside WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ: WRD).
data.description: Uber Technologies, Inc. has partnered with Mazda to enhance customer experience at U.S. dealerships, aiming to improve interactions and increase efficiency and satisfaction. This collaboration reflects Uber's efforts to expand beyond ride-hailing and leverage its technology platform in different sectors. The partnership highlights Uber's commitment to diversifying its service offerings and enhancing customer experiences. Additionally, Uber, along with WeRide Inc., has launched Abu Dhabi's first commercial robotaxi service. This move showcases Uber's dedication to innovation and expanding its presence in the evolving transportation landscape, potentially attracting more users and partners for long-term growth. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
